evals.prompt: Create a production-ready design token system from this demo. Need primitive tokens, semantic tokens, and component tokens following DTCG standards.
evals.expected_output: Generated complete token architecture with primitive/colors.ts, semantic/color-semantic.ts, component/button.ts files. Tokens use DTCG format with $type, $value, $description. Includes CSS variable generation and TypeScript types.

evals.prompt: Add theme support (light/dark) and responsive scaling to our token system for mobile, tablet, desktop breakpoints
evals.expected_output: Extended token system with theme variants in semantic layer, responsive spacing/breakpoint tokens, and media query-aware CSS custom properties that scale appropriately across screen sizes.
